hero.subtitle: Run your idea through multiple AI app builders in parallel and see real prototypes side by side.
hero.promptPlaceholder: Describe your app idea… e.g. 'Build a project management tool with Kanban boards, team chat, and Stripe billing'
hero.trustReferrals: We earn via referrals — you keep control
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1.title: Describe Your App
howItWorks.step1.desc: Enter a natural-language prompt describing the web app you want to build.
howItWorks.step2.title: Run Builders in Parallel
howItWorks.step2.desc: We send your prompt to multiple AI builders simultaneously and track progress in real time.
howItWorks.step3.title: Compare & Choose
howItWorks.step3.desc: See real prototypes side by side with AI-powered scoring on UI quality, code, speed, and more.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! You can run up to 3 comparison experiments for free without an account. Sign up to unlock unlimited experiments.
faq.q2: Which AI app builders do you support?
faq.a2: We currently support Lovable, Vercel v0, Bolt.new, Cursor, Replit, Base44, and more. We're constantly adding new builders.
faq.a3: Each build is evaluated by our AI scoring orchestra — multiple specialized agents analyze UI quality, code structure, speed, and editability. Scores include AI reasoning for full transparency.
faq.q4: Do I need accounts on each builder?
faq.a4: No. In broker mode, we run builds through our own accounts. You can also connect your own API keys for direct access.
faq.a5: We earn through referral partnerships with builders. When you choose to continue with a builder, we may receive a commission. Your results are never biased — scoring is blind and auditable.
auth.registerSuccess: Check your email — click the link to confirm your account.
guest.limitDesc: You've used {limit} free experiments. Sign up to continue without limits!
share.enablePublic: Enable public mode for others to see this experiment.
history.title: Past Experiments

compare.subtitle: Lovable vs Replit vs Vercel v0 vs Cursor vs Bolt — compare the best AI app builders. Find the best fit for your project.
